title: Add labels to beads
description:
Add arbitrary label support to beads for categorisation (e.g. 'architecture', 'refactor', 'hotfix').

Changes needed:

1. models.py — add 'labels: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)' to the Bead dataclass. Ensure it serialises/deserialises correctly via existing JSON handling.

2. cli.py — add 'takt bead label <bead_id> <label> [<label> ...]' subcommand that appends labels to a bead (idempotent — no duplicates). Add 'takt bead unlabel <bead_id> <label>' to remove a label.

3. cli.py — add '--label <value>' filter to 'takt bead list' (can be specified multiple times; beads must match ALL provided labels).

4. cli.py — show labels in 'takt bead show' output if the bead has any.

5. cli.py — add '--label <label>' option to 'takt bead create' (can be specified multiple times).
acceptance_criteria: takt bead create --label refactor --label hotfix <...> stores both labels on the bead
takt bead label <id> <label> adds the label idempotently
takt bead unlabel <id> <label> removes the label
takt bead list --label refactor returns only beads with that label
takt bead show displays labels when present
Existing beads without labels deserialise without error (empty list default)
